title: Make draft URL accessible in the app UI

requirements.text: Add a visible section in the main app page that lets the user access the app’s Draft URL (copy it) and manage/save their Live URL locally, by rendering the existing LiveSiteSection component within the App layout.
acceptanceCriteria: The main page renders the existing LiveSiteSection (frontend/src/components/LiveSiteSection.tsx) somewhere sensible (e.g., below the calculator/actions or above the footer).
The Draft URL is visible and can be copied via the provided UI, showing success/error toasts as currently implemented.
The Live URL input/save/clear/copy/open flows work as currently implemented, and the saved live URL persists via localStorage across page reloads.
All user-facing text remains in English.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or any other paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not implement actual publishing/deployment to Live from within the app; publishing remains an external step via the Caffeine dashboard as described in the UI.
nonGoals: Fixing or diagnosing the Caffeine platform deployment error itself (outside the app code).
Adding new authentication providers or third-party integrations.
